text.content: Coolify is an open-source & self-hostable alternative to Heroku / Netlify / Vercel / etc.

rich_text.plain_text: Coolify is an open-source & self-hostable alternative to Heroku / Netlify / Vercel / etc.

text.content: It helps you manage your servers, applications, and databases on your own hardware; you only need an SSH connection. You can manage VPS, Bare Metal, Raspberry PIs, and anything else.

rich_text.plain_text: It helps you manage your servers, applications, and databases on your own hardware; you only need an SSH connection. You can manage VPS, Bare Metal, Raspberry PIs, and anything else.

text.content: Imagine having the ease of a cloud but with your own servers. That is

rich_text.plain_text: Imagine having the ease of a cloud but with your own servers. That is

text.content: No vendor lock-in, which means that all the configurations for your applications/databases/etc are saved to your server. So, if you decide to stop using Coolify (oh nooo), you could still manage your running resources. You lose the automations and all the magic. 🪄️

text.content: To stay completely free and open-source, with no feature behind the paywall and evolve the project, we need your help. If you like Coolify, please consider donating to help us fund the project's future development.

text.content: Why should I use the Cloud version?

rich_text.plain_text: Why should I use the Cloud version?

text.content: The recommended way to use Coolify is to have one server for Coolify and one (or more) for the resources you are deploying. A server is around 4-5$/month.
